# beget_mysql_service (Resource)

MySQL managed service. Manages a cloud MySQL instance with configurable display name, region, tariff, and MySQL configuration parameters.

## Example Usage
```terraform
data "beget_mysql_configurations" "config_list" {
  version = "8.0.22"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_mysql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "MySQL Terraform"
  description      = "MySQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_mysql_configurations.config_list.configurations)[0]
}
```
```terraform
data "beget_regions" "regions_list" {}

data "beget_mysql_configurations" "config_list" {
  version = "8.0.22"
  region  = data.beget_regions.regions_list.regions.ru1.id
}

resource "beget_mysql_service" "tuned" {
  display_name     = "MySQL Terraform"
  region           = data.beget_regions.regions_list.regions.ru1.id
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_mysql_configurations.config_list.configurations)[0]
  params = {
    innodb_change_buffer_max_size = "100"
    max_connections               = "100"
    max_allowed_packet            = "16777216"
    transaction_isolation         = "READ-UNCOMMITTED"
  }
}
```

> **Note**
> The `params` block is a closed set of attributes. Only the keys listed
> in the schema below are supported. Any other keys will be ignored by
> Terraform during configuration parsing.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `configuration_id` (String) Tariff/configuration ID for the service (use beget_mysql_configurations data source to look up valid IDs).
- `display_name` (String) Display name for the MySQL service in the Beget Control Panel.
- `region` (String) Region where the service is created. Changing this field will recreate the service.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the MySQL service.
- `params` (Attributes) MySQL configuration parameters. All attributes have defaults that match the backend defaults. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--params))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service identifier assigned when the service is created.

<a id="nestedatt--params"></a>
### Nested Schema for `params`

Optional:

- `innodb_change_buffer_max_size` (String) Maximum size of the change buffer.
- `max_allowed_packet` (String) Maximum size of one packet or string.
- `max_connections` (String) Maximum number of client connections.
- `max_user_connections` (String) Maximum number of connections per user.
- `sql_mode` (String) SQL mode for the server.
- `transaction_isolation` (String) Default transaction isolation level.
